Welcome. I'm Whitney Dankworth — Data Scientist and ML Engineer with 4 years of experience at Microsoft.

This portfolio is an interactive terminal. Type a command below to explore.

bio.summary: I'm a Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer at Microsoft with 4 years of experience building production ML systems, experimentation platforms, and data-driven products. I'm passionate about bringing research to production and building tools that make data science more efficient.

highlights: [PLACEHOLDER] Built and deployed ML models serving 10M+ users
[PLACEHOLDER] Designed experimentation framework for A/B testing at scale
[PLACEHOLDER] Led cross-functional data science initiatives across 3 product teams
[PLACEHOLDER] Developed NLP pipelines for content classification

interests: [PLACEHOLDER] Open source tooling for data science

projects.title: [PLACEHOLDER] Real-Time Recommendation Engine
projects.description: [PLACEHOLDER] Built a real-time recommendation system using collaborative filtering and deep learning. Served 5M+ daily recommendations with <50ms latency. Deployed on Azure Kubernetes Service with MLflow model registry.

projects.title: [PLACEHOLDER] NLP-Powered Document Intelligence
projects.description: [PLACEHOLDER] Developed a document understanding pipeline using transformer models for entity extraction, classification, and summarization. Reduced manual review time by 60% for a compliance team of 50+ analysts.

projects.title: [PLACEHOLDER] Experimentation Platform
projects.description: [PLACEHOLDER] Designed and built an internal experimentation platform for A/B testing ML model variants. Supports automated statistical analysis, guardrail metrics, and progressive rollouts across 12 product surfaces.
